title: Query with not joins and condition returning the wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t9e (c8a__y_g_0 VARCHAR(255), c8b__y_g_1 BIGINT, c8c__y_g_2 TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t9f (c8d__y_g_0 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, c8e__y_g_1 BIGINT DEFAULT 0, c8f__y_g_2 DATE);
INSERT INTO t9e (c8a__y_g_0, c8b__y_g_1, c8c__y_g_2) VALUES (NULL, 1, '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO t9f (c8d__y_g_0, c8e__y_g_1, c8f__y_g_2) VALUES ('test', NULL, '2023-01-01');
SELECT * FROM t9e WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t9f WHERE t9e.c8a__y_g_0 = t9f.c8d__y_g_0);
key_bug_features: Query with NOT EXISTS condition returning incorrect results
